title: Lepro LED Strip Light White 5M 300 LEDs, 1650lm Dimmable Strip Lights for Kitchen, Cool White 6000K Daylight LED Strip for Under Units Cabinet Cupboards (12V Power Plug and Dimmer Switch Included)
features: Dimmable LED Strip Light - This 5M LED strip light comes with a comfortable dimmer dial, enabling you to adjust the brightness to fit your desired atmosphere or lighting necessities.

Bright & Energy-Efficient LED Lights - Fitted with 300 SMD2835 LEDs, this light strip emits a uniform 1650lm bright white light, consuming far less power than conventional lighting options - making it a cost-effective and environmentally considerate choice.

Plug in & Safe for use - Our Lepro LED strip light comes with a 12V power supply. Simply plug and play without wiring. Plus, due to its low operating voltage, it outputs minimal heat, rendering it safe to touch and use.

Hassle-Free Installation - This slim LED tape light comes with a self-adhesive backing, making it easy to attach to a variety of surfaces without drilling or screwing. You can also cut it to length if required (Note: the section you cut off will need an additional 12v power supply or a 2pin 8mm connector, otherwise, it won't light up).
What's in The Package - 1 x cool white LED strip light 5m, 1 x 12V power supply, 1 x dimmer switch, 6 x clips with screws for extra security, and a user manual.

Lepro LED Strip Light White 5M Brighten up any dull space with bright white light, and enhance the ambiance of any space. Nice and Bright Light for Every Occasion Previous page From Dim to Super Bright 1650lm 12V Safe to Touch & Durable Transform Any Space Set the Perfect Brightness Great Addition to Any Room Next page Easy to Use LED Strip Light Dimmable and Energy Effective With the dimmer dial, you can set the right brightness to suit your daily needs. Plug and Play without Wiring If the power cable is not long enough, please search "5.5mm x 2.1mm 12v dc extention cable" Hassle-Free Installation - No screws or drill making a mess just stick and go. 1. Clean the Surface Wipe the surface with a clean and dry cloth or tissue before installing the strip light. 2. Peel and Stick Peel off the paper backing and apply it to the surface, press firmly to ensure good adhesion. 3. Add Extra Support 6 spare sticky clips and little screws provided to secure the bends if necessary. 4. Cut to Length For reconnection, you will need to buy extra 2pin 8mm connectors (not included) . Flexible and Versatile LED Light Strip, Slim and Easy to Hide Kitchen Lighting Light up worktops, kick boards, under the island, cabinet, cupboard and kitchen units. Room Lighting Transform your living room, bedroom, dinning room and other rooms, great for ceiling, wall, door frames, under bed or sofa, behind tv, etc Display Lighting Illuminate shelves, wine cellar, bookcases, wardrobes, displays, showcase, billboard and more. Lighting Decor Add light to vanity mirror, stair skirting board, hallway and anywhere you like.
